prompt: Can you implement this story for me? Requirements: Add rate limiting to the REST API — max 100 requests per minute per IP address. If exceeded, return HTTP 429 with a Retry-After header. Use Redis for the counter. The codebase is in /home/user/dot-claude-playground. Use the jira-multi-agent skill.

assertions.description: A file named implementation_summary.md exists in the outputs directory

assertions.text: Summary mentions rate limiting or HTTP 429
assertions.description: The implementation summary references rate limiting, 429 status code, or request throttling
The implementation summary references Redis as the counter/storage mechanism
The implementation references the Retry-After response header

assertions.text: Summary includes a files-changed section or table
assertions.description: The summary lists which files were created or modified
The summary references test files or test cases that were added

assertions.text: (with_skill only) Execution trace shows multi-agent phases
assertions.description: execution_trace.md shows Design, Coding, and Testing agents were invoked separately
